case_title: JESUS BENITEZ ET AL VS. CHAMPION RECOVERY SERVICES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BENITEZ, JESUS AYALA, CAMILA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION RECOVERY SERVICES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-27-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF JESUS BENITEZ AND CAMILA AYALA ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE AS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS SIGNATURE IS NOT LEGIBLE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAMPION RECOVERY SERVICES INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENITEZ, JESUS AYALA, CAMILA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION RECOVERY SERVICES INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED MAY-11-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMPION RECOVERY SERVICES INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CHAMPION RECOVERY SERVICES INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JAMES HALTER, CFO. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
